mapper.sql: e.apply_id, e.apply_no, e.reg_id, e.patient_id, e.doctor_id, e.item_id, e.clinical_info, e.status, e.exam_doctor_id, e.exam_result, e.exam_time, e.create_time, e.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT , p.patient_name, p.patient_no, p.gender, p.age, du.real_name AS doctor_name, ei.item_name, ei.item_code, ei.item_price, eu.real_name AS exam_doctor_name FROM exam_apply e LEFT JOIN patient p ON e.patient_id = p.patient_id LEFT JOIN sys_user du ON e.doctor_id = du.user_id LEFT JOIN exam_item ei ON e.item_id = ei.item_id LEFT JOIN sys_user eu ON e.exam_doctor_id = eu.user_id WHERE e.apply_id = #{applyId}

SELECT , p.patient_name, p.patient_no, p.gender, p.age, du.real_name AS doctor_name, ei.item_name, ei.item_code, ei.item_price, eu.real_name AS exam_doctor_name FROM exam_apply e LEFT JOIN patient p ON e.patient_id = p.patient_id LEFT JOIN sys_user du ON e.doctor_id = du.user_id LEFT JOIN exam_item ei ON e.item_id = ei.item_id LEFT JOIN sys_user eu ON e.exam_doctor_id = eu.user_id WHERE e.reg_id = #{regId} ORDER BY e.apply_id

SELECT , p.patient_name, p.patient_no, p.gender, p.age, du.real_name AS doctor_name, ei.item_name, ei.item_code, ei.item_price, eu.real_name AS exam_doctor_name FROM exam_apply e LEFT JOIN patient p ON e.patient_id = p.patient_id LEFT JOIN sys_user du ON e.doctor_id = du.user_id LEFT JOIN exam_item ei ON e.item_id = ei.item_id LEFT JOIN sys_user eu ON e.exam_doctor_id = eu.user_id WHERE e.patient_id = #{patientId} AND e.status = #{status} ORDER BY e.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_apply (apply_no, reg_id, patient_id, doctor_id, item_id, clinical_info, status) VALUES (#{applyNo}, #{regId}, #{patientId}, #{doctorId}, #{itemId}, #{clinicalInfo}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_apply SET status = #{status} WHERE apply_id = #{applyId}
